tagline: We help nonprofits and grassroots organizations automate the rest — so your team can focus on what only humans can do.
focus_areas: Workflow automation for orgs under 20 staff with no dedicated IT
AI-powered knowledge management for scattered internal docs and policies
Automated reporting pipelines that pull from multiple data sources
Slack-first internal tools for distributed nonprofit teams

past_work.what_built: AI-powered QA automation system (SpecCheck) — Claude-based content review pipeline with Airtable integration, deployed on internal cloud infrastructure with CI/CD
past_work.outcome: Automated content QA process that previously required manual review, deployed to production with full test coverage
past_work.public_description: Built an AI-powered QA automation pipeline for a major entertainment studio, replacing manual content review with an intelligent system that scores and validates content against specifications

past_work.what_built: AI agent for cross-platform in-app purchase pricing automation (MobileIAPManager) — ingests pricing CSVs, uses Claude to orchestrate updates across Apple App Store Connect API, Google Play Developer API, and ONE Store via browser automation
past_work.outcome: Reduced multi-platform pricing updates from manual per-platform entry to a single CSV-driven automated workflow across 3 storefronts
past_work.public_description: Built an AI-driven agent that automates cross-platform pricing updates across multiple digital storefronts from a single data source, eliminating hours of repetitive manual entry

past_work.what_built: ML image processing testing framework (LociTesting) — validates AI captioning and color classification APIs against asset libraries from Frontify, generates QA-ready CSV reports for stakeholder review
past_work.outcome: Enabled systematic QA validation of ML services across hundreds of assets, supporting productization decisions for AI-powered asset tagging
past_work.public_description: Built an ML testing and validation framework that systematically evaluates AI-powered image classification services, generating structured QA reports for stakeholder review

past_work.what_built: Google Apps Script automation suite — dynamic price point filtering system (replaced 90+ hardcoded filter functions with a single dynamic detection engine) and localization exporter supporting 30+ languages with automated compliance handling
past_work.outcome: Replaced 90+ individual hardcoded functions with one dynamic system; localization exporter handles 30+ languages with automated Japanese compliance disclaimers
past_work.public_description: Built Google Workspace automation that replaced 90+ hardcoded spreadsheet functions with a single dynamic system, plus a multi-language localization exporter supporting 30+ languages

past_work.what_built: Led development of a user-generated content service (collection, review, serving) as Senior Software Engineer. Managed core user identity service. Instituted product standard practices for cross-team collaboration. Managed engineering interns across fall, spring, and summer cohorts. Owned project planning, scoping, timelines, and documentation across teams.
past_work.outcome: Improved content management efficiency org-wide; ensured system reliability for core user identity service; reduced project delays through standardized cross-team collaboration practices
past_work.sector: youth civic engagement and social change
past_work.org_context: Largest nonprofit exclusively for young people and social change — mobilized 8M+ young people across 189 countries to address safety, education access, economic opportunity, and environmental sustainability

past_work.what_built: Senior Manager of Online Production — redesigned and rebuilt the organization's website on Drupal 7, designed and developed marketing email campaigns, produced and edited video projects, coordinated with social media managers to promote events and GLAAD's advocacy work.
past_work.outcome: Full website redesign and rebuild on Drupal 7; established the org's digital production pipeline across web, email, video, and social media
past_work.org_context: Leading LGBTQ+ media advocacy organization promoting LGBTQ+ acceptance and stories in news, entertainment, and digital media

rate_range.notes: Starting at $60/hr for community orgs to build portfolio; target rate is $80-120/hr as client base grows
